ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant associated with the order */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Time when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_time" TEXT /* Actual delivery time for the order */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the order */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is completed */,
  "paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the payment has been made */,
  "cooked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order has been cooked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Delivery address of the customer */,
  "address_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the customer's delivery address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "menu_items" TEXT /* Menu items offered by the restaurant */,
  "working_hours" TEXT /* Working hours of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_type" TEXT /* Type of restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being delivered */,
  "delivery_person_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery person */,
  "delivery_person_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery person */,
  "delivery_vehicle" TEXT /* Type of vehicle used for delivery */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the delivery started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the delivery ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery */,
  "delivery_distance" TEXT /* Distance traveled for delivery */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Time taken for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_delivery_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_person_id") REFERENCES delivery_persons ("delivery_person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_persons" (
  "delivery_person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Full name of the delivery person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the delivery person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the delivery person */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the delivery person */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability of the delivery person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code used to apply the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of discount */,
  "discount_value" TEXT /* Value of the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_discounts" (
  "order_discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the order-discount link */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applied */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code used to apply the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_discounts_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_discounts_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_allergens" TEXT /* Allergens associated with the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_ingredients" (
  "item_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the item-ingredient link */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_ingredients_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who submitted the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "owner_role" TEXT /* Role of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_owners_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
